rationale: Review 1's only finding (add symmetric `id * S = 1` lemma) is a real but unnecessary completeness nit unrelated to the generality of `instGroup`/`mapValue`/`instCommGroup` or the bialgebra-to-Hopf axis; acting on it adds unused code without improving any theorem in the diff. Review 2's sound approve therefore yields the better merged PR (no needless edits).
